source_pr.title: executor: fix union dual table order by but not sort
source_pr.body: ### What problem does this PR solve? using https://github.com/pingcap/parser/pull/22 's modification. fixes #8201 ### What is changed and how it works? change go.mod, add test case ### Check List Tests - Integration test by https://github.com/pingcap/tidb-test/pull/645 Code changes - Add Test Side effects - N/A Related changes - N/A --- This change is [](https://reviewable.io/reviews/pingcap/tidb/8251)

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("SELECT(SELECT 0 AS a FROM dual UNION SELECT 1 AS a FROM dual ORDER BY a ASC LIMIT 1) AS dev").Check(testkit.Rows("0")) (executor/executor_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("SELECT(SELECT 0 AS a FROM dual UNION SELECT 1 AS a FROM dual ORDER BY a ASC LIMIT 1) AS dev").Check(testkit.Rows("0")) (executor/executor_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("SELECT(SELECT 0 AS a FROM dual UNION SELECT 1 AS a FROM dual ORDER BY a ASC LIMIT 1) AS dev").Check(testkit.Rows("0")) (executor/executor_test.go)
